Display.multi_display: Supports up to 5 independent displays (8K reduces simultaneous count)

memory.type: DDR5-5600, 4x 32GB / 4x 48GB configurations run at 4000 MT/s. Other configurations over 2 DIMMs run at 4400 MT/s.
memory.slots: Four DDR5 SODIMM slots, dual-channel capable
memory.features: Dual-channel capable, ECC on models with ECC DIMMs

pen: No support (non-touch LCD display doesn't support pen input)

storage.ssd_pcie: One M.2 2280 SSD / PCIe NVMe, PCIe 5.0 x4, up to 4TB and Two M.2 2280 SSD / PCIe NVMe, PCIe 4.0 x4, up to 4TB, RAID 0/1/5 support

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter

SIM_Card.type: KDDI eSIM Program (Japan) (various plans) or no physical SIM card

ports: 2 x Thunderbolt 5 (with USB PD 3.1 and DP 2.1)
1 x Thunderbolt 4 (with USB PD 3.1 and DP 2.1)
camera: Front 5.0MP + IR discrete with privacy shutter, Computer Vision Human Presence Detection on Image Signal Processor (ISP), temporal noise reduction
Front HD 5.0MP with privacy shutter, temporal noise reduction
audio: SoundWire®, Cirrus Logic® CS42L43 codec / stereo speakers, 2W x2, Dolby Atmos /  Dual-microphone array, far-field, Dolby Voice® or No microphone for special bid model
keyboard: 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys, 1.5mm/1.35mm travel, Copilot key, LED backlight
TrackPoint pointing device, double-tap Quick Menu, Glass-like Mylar trackpad
